message:
feat(cli): add --project flag to send and kill commands (bd-3cu02.14)

Extends the --project/-p filter from list to send and kill:
- send --project <name>: broadcasts prompt to all sessions sharing base project
- kill --project <name>: kills all sessions for a project (with confirmation)
- Mutual exclusivity with positional session arg enforced
- Uses config.SessionBase() for consistent label-aware matching

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
